CustomField.description: This formula field is a technical field, used as criteria on Lightning page to display non blocking error message when the account of the case is different than the account of contact & contract related to this case.
CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(ContactId)) && Account.Id <> Contact.AccountId && ( Account.Id = Contract__r.AccountId || ISBLANK(Contract__c)),"Contact", IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Contract__c)) && Account.Id <> Contract__r.AccountId && ( Account.Id = Contact.AccountId || ISBLANK( ContactId )), "Contract", IF(NOT(ISBLANK(ContactId) && (Account.Id <> Contact.AccountId)) && (Account.Id <> Contract__r.AccountId && NOT(ISBLANK(Contract__c))), "Contract Contact", "None") ) )
CustomField.label: Tech_Alert message on case
